mapper.insert: INSERT INTO nx_machine_print_record ( nx_pr_bill_id, nx_pr_device_id, nx_pr_market_id, nx_pr_distributer_id, nx_pr_distributer_type, nx_pr_paper_type, nx_pr_paper_count, nx_pr_print_time, nx_pr_print_status, nx_pr_bill_total, nx_pr_bill_date, nx_pr_bill_trade_no, nx_pr_operator_id, nx_pr_operator_name, nx_pr_remark, nx_pr_create_time ) VALUES ( #{nxPrBillId}, #{nxPrDeviceId}, #{nxPrMarketId}, #{nxPrDistributerId}, #{nxPrDistributerType}, #{nxPrPaperType}, #{nxPrPaperCount}, #{nxPrPrintTime}, #{nxPrPrintStatus}, #{nxPrBillTotal}, #{nxPrBillDate}, #{nxPrBillTradeNo}, #{nxPrOperatorId}, #{nxPrOperatorName}, #{nxPrRemark}, NOW() )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM nx_machine_print_record WHERE nx_pr_id IN
#{nxPrId}
